mermaidSyntax:
erDiagram
  Patient ||--o{ Enrollment : "has"
  Study ||--o{ Enrollment : "includes"
  Enrollment ||--o{ Visit : "schedules"
  Visit ||--o{ LabResult : "produces"
  Enrollment ||--o{ AdverseEvent : "records"

  Patient {
    int patient_id PK
    string name
    date dob
    string sex
    string ethnicity
  }

  Study {
    int study_id PK
    string title
    string phase
    date start_date
    date end_date
    string PI_name
  }

  Enrollment {
    int enrollment_id PK
    int patient_id FK
    int study_id FK
    date consent_date
    string status
    string arm
  }

  Visit {
    int visit_id PK
    int enrollment_id FK
    date visit_date
    string visit_type
    string location
  }

  LabResult {
    int result_id PK
    int visit_id FK
    string test_name
    float value
    string unit
    string reference_range
    string flag
  }

  AdverseEvent {
    int ae_id PK
    int enrollment_id FK
    string description
    string severity
    date onset_date
    date resolution_date
    string related_to_study
  }
